description: Repo-synced Zenith release notes, version-by-version, through the narrow Directus read path.

intro.title: RELEASES. IN ORDER. NO DRIFT.
intro.description: The changelog keeps the release line explicit: published versions, repo-synced notes, and adjacent releases that stay tied to the real train instead of marketing copy.

archive.title: Published notes from the train line.
archive.description: Release notes stay markdown-first in the repo, sync into Directus, and publish here as the narrow public release surface.

labels.archiveDescription: Versioned notes stay ordered, public, and easy to scan without widening the rest of the site content boundary.

cta.title: Read the release, then open the contract.
cta.description: The changelog records what shipped. The docs hold the stable public contract the release is expected to honor.
cta.label: Open docs
